data.name: Tamer Vale
data.detailed_description:
Tamer Vale是一款回合制卡牌遊戲，三位被稱為馴魔士的女精靈英雄們踏上旅程，尋找玷污大地的源頭，並使用她們的特殊儀式恢復平衡！


每位精靈們都有獨特的技能和卡牌組。她們將會遇上各種不同的敵人，其中一些強大敵人更要通過馴魔士的秘密儀式來馴服他們！


Tamers需要你來引導她們擇前進的道路，管理他們的技能和進行各式各樣的儀式以抵禦敵人的侵襲。

遊戲特點：

  • 透過選擇、升級和移除來建立並管理你的卡牌組合。
  • 超過150種多樣化的卡牌，讓你發掘各種玩法和策略。
  • 3個地圖區域各自充滿獨特敵人和具有挑戰性的頭目。
  • 體驗22個手工繪製的像素藝術動畫，描繪精靈們的各種儀式。
  • 沉浸在懷舊的復古風格像素藝術中，全都是由畫師精心手繪。
  • 享受受經典奇幻風格的RPG遊戲配樂。
  • 探索由一個由2人獨立製作團隊帶來非常用心製作的大量內容。

data.short_description: Tamer Vale 是一款回合制卡牌對戰遊戲，三位被稱為Tamers 的女精靈踏上旅程，穿越她們隱蔽的山谷，尋找並對抗玷污大地的源頭，並用她們的特殊儀式將這片土地恢復平衡！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 或以上
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 256 MB視訊記憶體，Shader Model 3.0以上
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.15 Catalina
  • 處理器: 雙核處理器
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1 或更高版本
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間

data.name: Tamer Vale
data.detailed_description:
Tamer Vale is a turn based card battler, where a collective of elven heroines, known as Tamers, journey forth beyond the safety of their hidden valley to find and confront the sources of corruption in the land, and bring balance to it using their special rituals!


The Elves of the glade are armed with unique skills and abilities. They will meet and subdue a wide range of foes, some of which are immensely powerful and can only be truly defeated by the Tamers secretive rituals!


The Tamers will need your help to guide them past the Gloomward and forests edge as they encounter the source of the demonic influences disrupting balance across their Glades.

Help them choose the way forward, manage their abilities, skills and rituals to keep the demons at bay!

Key Features:

  • Build and manage your card deck through selection, upgrades, and removal.
  • Enjoy over 150 diverse cards supporting various playstyles and strategies.
  • Conquer 3 maps filled with unique enemies and challenging bosses.
  • Experience 22 beautifully handcrafted pixel art animations depicting the elves and their encounters.
  • Immerse in visually nostalgic retro-style pixel graphics, entirely hand-drawn and animated.
  • Indulge in a musical score inspired by classic fantasy RPGs.
  • Explore a vast array of content crafted with love and care by a small indie team of 2 people.

data.supported_languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or better
  • Processor: 2 Ghz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 256 mb video memory, shader model 3.0+
  • Storage: 100 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: MacOS 10.15 Catalina
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.1 or higher
  • Storage: 100 MB available space
